name: Porta Cabins
description:
SAMAN's porta cabin range spans a full set of types and price points — from a ₹1,25,000 mini unit to multi-room offices — and the right choice depends on your budget, use and footprint. This page maps every porta cabin type to the job it does best and lists each one's starting price, so you can shortlist before you call.

Porta Cabin Types by Use-Case

SAMAN's porta cabin types fall into six families: budget units for tight site spends, compact mini and small cabins for single occupants, site and professional offices, sanitation cabins with attached or dedicated toilets, retail shop cabins, and premium steel, MS, prefabricated and luxury builds. Each is factory-built on a mild-steel frame and delivered ready to use. For the lowest entry price, the Mini Porta Cabin and Low Cost Porta Cabin cover single-person posts and short-term site needs. For a manager's workspace, the Porta Cabin Office gives you a finished site office and the larger Portacabin Office scales to a professional multi-cabin layout, while the Small Portacabin suits a compact store-room. Sanitation is covered two ways — the Porta Cabin with Toilet combines a working space with an attached toilet, and the Toilet Porta Cabins are a dedicated multi-fixture block. Retail buyers choose the Porta Cabin Shop. For the strongest structures, the Steel Porta Cabin, MS Porta Cabin and Prefabricated Porta Cabin step up frame and panel grade, the Luxury Porta Cabin adds a premium interior, Buy Porta Cabins lists stock units for fast despatch, and the standard Porta Cabin configuration anchors the range.

Price List & Size Comparison Across the Range

This porta cabin price list sets out the starting price for each type, so you can match a budget to a configuration at a glance:
Porta cabin type Best suited for Footprint Price from
Mini Porta Cabin Single-person post, gate or guard point Compact ₹1,25,000
Low Cost Porta Cabin Tight-budget temporary site use Standard ₹2,15,000
Steel Porta Cabin Maximum durability, all-steel build Standard ₹2,16,000
Small Portacabin Compact office or store-room Compact ₹2,25,000
Porta Cabin Shop Factory-built retail outlet Standard ₹2,25,000
Porta Cabin with Toilet Workspace plus attached toilet Standard ₹2,65,000
MS Porta Cabin IS 2062 mild-steel frame Standard ₹3,25,000
Toilet Porta Cabins Sanitation block, multiple fixtures Standard ₹3,55,000
Porta Cabin Office Site manager workspace Standard ₹3,75,000
Buy Porta Cabins Stock unit, fast despatch Standard ₹3,85,000
Portacabin Office Professional multi-cabin office Large ₹5,25,000
Prefabricated Porta Cabin Factory-controlled premium build Large ₹5,30,000
Luxury Porta Cabin Premium interior, executive use Large ₹5,35,000
Starting prices are current SAMAN list prices; the final figure depends on the size and fit-out you configure, and exact dimensions are shown on each product page.

How to Choose Your Porta Cabin — Budget, Material, Use and Size

Four factors decide which unit you order. Budget comes first: the range opens at ₹1,25,000 and climbs with size, panel grade and interior finish — and if you're comparing porta cabins for sale on price alone, weigh the ten-year cost, not just the sticker, before you commit. Material is next: a mild-steel or all-steel frame holds up far longer than a thin-panel cabin under frequent relocation and monsoon exposure. Use-case narrows it quickly — a site office, a retail shop and a sanitation cabin are built differently, and choosing by job avoids paying for capacity you won't use. A purpose-built guard post is a security cabin, not a porta cabin, and a standalone sanitation unit is a portable toilet rather than our cabin-with-toilet — so route those needs to the right product. Footprint is last: pick the smallest cabin that fits your people and equipment, since a tighter unit is cheaper to buy, transport and relocate.

Why Source Your Porta Cabin Range from SAMAN

As a porta cabin manufacturer with two production units — in Bangalore and Greater Noida (Delhi NCR) — SAMAN builds every cabin in the range on a mild-steel frame with insulated PUF panels, so the entry unit and the premium unit share the same structural standard. Ordering the full range from one maker means a single point of customization, consistent build quality across multiple units on the same project, and one delivery and after-sales contact instead of several. For the full specification of the standard unit and how it ships, see our porta cabin overview.

Porta Cabin Range — FAQs

What porta cabin types does SAMAN make, and which fits my project?

SAMAN builds budget, mini, small, site-office, professional-office, shop, sanitation, steel, MS, prefabricated and luxury porta cabins. Match the type to your job — a single-person post needs a mini unit, a manager needs a site office, a retailer needs a shop cabin — then refine by budget and footprint.

What is the price range across SAMAN's porta cabin types?

Starting prices run from ₹1,25,000 for a mini porta cabin to ₹5,35,000 for a luxury unit. The figure you pay depends on size, frame and panel grade, and interior fit-out; each product page lists its own starting price and exact dimensions.

Should I choose a standard porta cabin type or a custom configuration?

Start with the standard type closest to your use — it ships faster and costs less. Move to a custom configuration only when your size, layout or finish genuinely differs from the standard unit; SAMAN can adjust dimensions and fit-out on any cabin in the range.

Which porta cabin suits a site office versus a shop versus sanitation?

A site office calls for the Porta Cabin Office or Portacabin Office; a retail outlet suits the Porta Cabin Shop; and sanitation is the Porta Cabin with Toilet (workspace plus attached toilet) or the Toilet Porta Cabins (a dedicated block).

Get Your Porta Cabin Quote

Bangalore: Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR: Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937 Tell us your use and footprint and we'll point you to the right unit with an exact price.
